narrative:
Precinct Toledo 9C (precinct in Lucas County) has 929 registered voters, with 69.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.4 percentage points.
